title: Principal Plant Manager at Bharat Petroleum Global Group

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Bharat Petroleum Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Bharat Petroleum Global Group in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Petroleum Global Group:
Bharat Petroleum Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
